component.name: TVT IPTool
component.summary: Discover and configure TVT cameras on Linux

description.p: TVT IPTool is a clean-room Linux utility for discovering TVT-family cameras, NVRs, and DVRs on a local network.
Discovery and targeted Layer-2 network configuration work without proprietary software.
Add multi-device selection, verified bulk DHCP and sequential static-IP changes, in-app configuration, About information, and safer IPv4/IPv6 transitions.
Add authenticated NVR web provisioning, Layer-2 fallback, and longer MAC-based verification.
Use the original TVT Layer-2 set-IP protocol and strengthen post-change verification.
